meaning: n.[物]托卡马克(一种环状大电流的箍缩等离子体实验装置)
examples: This article Outlines a model for calculating the parameters oi a tokamak fusion reactor core.
The pumping divertor initially realizes the pumping and control of edge particles in tokamak discharge.
Spherical Tokamak is showing an attractive promising route for commercial application of fusion energy.
An analysis of its performance showed its containment capacity did, indeed, match a tokamak's.
Though destructive, the flood of neutrons produced by a tokamak is (or, rather, should be) the source of its power.
